executiveSummary.headline: Supply chain observable, auditable and partially remediable.
executiveSummary.situation: The lab converts technical evidence into risk, compliance and remediation views.
executiveSummary.businessRisk: Medium-high until image signing, runner hardening and audit-pack verification are enforced.
executiveSummary.decisionNeeded: Prioritize signing/provenance, runner isolation, compliance evidence and remediation readiness.
executiveSummary.twoMinuteMessage: The current platform can show top risks, explain evidence, map compliance impact and route engineers to patch actions.

topFindings.title: GitHub Actions workflow uses unpinned actions
topFindings.businessImpact: Build provenance can be weakened by mutable third-party actions.
topFindings.patchRef: Pin actions to SHA and regenerate evidence-pack.

topFindings.title: GitLab runner allows privileged Docker execution
topFindings.businessImpact: Compromised CI job could pivot into build infrastructure.
topFindings.patchRef: Disable privileged mode and isolate runner.

topFindings.title: Dependency-Track reports critical vulnerable component
topFindings.businessImpact: Known vulnerable dependency may affect exposed runtime service.
topFindings.patchRef: Upgrade component and attach SBOM delta.

topFindings.title: SonarQube quality gate failed
topFindings.businessImpact: Release quality gate failure increases operational and compliance risk.
topFindings.patchRef: Block release until quality gate passes.

complianceStatus.gap: Provenance and attestation controls need enforcement.
Remediation workflow exists but must be tied to change approval.
Supply-chain evidence exists but continuous monitoring is not complete.

remediationReadiness.nextAction: Generate patch guidance to pin actions by SHA.
Upgrade vulnerable component and attach SBOM delta.

auditPackStatus.auditorPath: Open evidence, findings, compliance impacts and remediation refs without launching the technical lab.
